heroHeadline: Six Finals Set for March 31 — Kosovo Stun Slovakia 4–3; Gyökeres Hat-trick Fires Sweden; Bolivia & Jamaica Through
heroSubtitle: All 6 World Cup berths still up for grabs: Italy vs Bosnia, Sweden vs Poland, Turkey vs Kosovo, Denmark vs Czechia (UEFA); DR Congo vs Jamaica, Iraq vs Bolivia (intercontinental) — finals March 31
footerNote: Data sourced from FIFA.com, UEFA.com, US Soccer, CONCACAF, ESPN, The Athletic, BBC Sport, AP, Reuters, NPR, Al Jazeera, Human Rights Watch, American Immigration Council
